listings.title: 2 Stephens trusonic alnico coaxial 12" speakers
listings.body: These are Stephens. A very high end brand. The woofers work but could use new paper, one tweeter is out. L pads intact. Cast frame. Alnico. Thee are for those who know. If you don't know, do some research Will ship but you pay all shipping and fees. If you have an account with one of the big three, ups fed ex, etc., I will use it.

listings.title: Gibson BR-1 lap guitar late forties sale/trade call
listings.body: I would rather have a decent classical guitar. Missing two covers but whole. Tunes well and solid. Very stable. Some scrapes etc. Calling is best Here is what these can command. https://www.retrofret.com/product.asp?ProductID=12575&name=Gibson-BR1-Ultratone-Owned-and-Used-by-Elliott-Sharp-Lap-Steel-Electric-Guitar-1951 https://reverb.com/item/85838817-gibson-ultratone-lap-steel-pink-white-w-ohsc Happy to trade for a very decent classical guitar

listings.title: WOOD PLANE
listings.body: 7” wood plane Very nice condition Only for pickup in Bedford, NY 10506, northern Westchester County Please see my other items for sale on CL , tap ‘ see more from this user’ Thanks

listings.title: Batch of Summer Toys
listings.body: It's summertime and the kids need to get outside.   So,  I'm selling this group of toys,  some new and some used: 1 water tag set (new in box!) 4 kites + 1 spool of string 3 wiffle bats + 1 wiffle ball 1 hula hoop 2 air launched foam rockets with launcher 1 foam body board Pay cash on pickup from Rye Brook,  Westchester.
